features: GOODBYE FATIGUE, HELLO RADIANCE: Add Vitamin C eye patches to your daily routine and trade in puffiness and dullness for a vibrant, refreshed look! There are 30 pairs (60 pieces) inside & each container includes a inner protective seal to keep the eye masks fresh and hygienic.

DEEP HYDRATION: Infused with Vitamin C & Caffeine, these under eye masks help reduce the appearance of dark circles, and fine lines for a hydrated look. The blend assists with circulation and collagen production, leaving your under-eyes visibly brighter, firmer, and revitalized! They make for a great dark circles under eye treatment.

FAST & EFFORTLESS SKINCARE: These eye masks for puffy eyes absorb quickly and seamlessly fit into any routine. Simply apply for a refreshing boost—perfect for mornings, travel, or whenever your skin needs a pick-me-up!

PERFECT FOR GIFTING: These eye patches for dark circles and puffiness make thoughtful self-care gifts for women, bachelorette party gifts, bridesmaid proposal gifts, gifts for teens and bridal party treats. Give the gift of relaxation and rejuvenation for any special occasion!
GENTLE & SKIN-FRIENDLY: Our eye gel patches are designed for even the most sensitive skin. Experience effective results with a formula that cares for your delicate under-eye area.
